name: Salat Khaek (Southern Thai Salad)
recipeIngredient: 2 dried chillies, seeds removed and soaked in water
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the dressing: Pound the chillies, salt, shallots, and curry powder well in a mortar. Remove the yolks from the two eggs and mix them into the chili paste.
2. Heat 1 cup of coconut milk until some oil surfaces. Add the chili paste and stir to disperse. Cook until fragrant, then add the remaining coconut milk, fish sauce, sugar, and tamarind juice.
3. Prepare the salad: Cut a potato into very thin slices, soak in water, drain well, and fry in hot oil until crisp and golden brown. Cut firm white bean curd into thin slices and fry until crisp. Peel cucumbers and onion, then cut them and tomatoes into thin slices. Arrange lettuce on a platter and add the cucumber, bean sprouts, onion, tomatoes, eggs, bean curd, and potato. Spoon the salad dressing over the salad and serve immediately.
Serves 2.
